name: Crockpot Sausage & Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds hash brown potatoes, not thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced smoked sausage and hash brown potatoes in a well-buttered crockpot.
2. Stir gently to mix the ingredients.
3. Whisk together the cheddar cheese soup and milk.
4. Pour the soup mixture over the sausage and potato mixture in the crockpot.
5. Cook on low for about 6 to 8 hours, stirring occasionally.
